governing_requirement: Producer emits an exact named/hash-bound use_eligibility observation derived from normalized facts; Main preserves but discards it as authority, independently recomputes intended-use eligibility, and fails closed on disagreement. LLM/provider/global-certified shortcuts and partial certificate scope cannot pass.

dependency_state.disposition: MF-P6-09.05 remains hard-blocked; only wire shape, rank guard and closed authority-lattice foundations receive credit.

prior_evidence.disposition: Accepted for requirement mapping, trusted probes and additive producer packet. Prerequisite states are superseded by the current tracker.

verified_foundations: The frozen receipt strictly requires policy_id, policy_sha256, required_authority_state, exact_use_scope, eligible and non-empty unique reasons.
Receipt validation rejects eligible=true when execution failed or observed operational authority ranks below the producer-declared required state.

The completed operational authority lattice is self-hashed, separates access mode, operational authority and training truth, enforces producer-only grants/revocation, weakest-parent ceilings, protected/target floors and typed failures.
Receipt/certificate validation prevents certified authority without exact active certificate, fresh revocation, QA pass and transform round-trip.
Twenty-six focused receipt/authority-lattice tests pass and Ruff passes; all governing source hashes match the accepted prior audit.

direct_probes.mutation: Replace policy ID/hash with an LLM-style global-certified assertion and trusted re-sign.
direct_probes.gap: No named policy is resolved or self-hash recomputed.

direct_probes.mutation: Change production_conditioning to diagnostic and trusted re-sign.
direct_probes.gap: Required authority and eligibility are not recomputed from exact intended-use scope.

direct_probes.mutation: Replace reasons with provider says globally certified and trusted re-sign.
direct_probes.gap: Reasons are free-form rather than a closed deterministic reason set.

direct_probes.mutation: Set eligible=false with an arbitrary reason on the otherwise eligible certified receipt and trusted re-sign.
direct_probes.gap: No producer recomputation exists to detect even an internally inconsistent observation.

confirmed_gaps: No closed self-hashed use policy maps exact use scopes to authority floors and closed ordered reason codes.

No producer evaluator normalizes factual request/receipt/certificate/authority/consumption/QA/transform/lineage/revocation evidence while excluding the producer observation itself from decision inputs.
No evaluator recomputes required authority from exact use scope or checks complete owner/intent/label/region/certificate permitted-use coverage.
No internal strict decision record binds normalized facts, policy, eligibility, reasons and canonical decision hash.
No validator recomputes the supplied frozen-v1 observation and rejects policy/minimum/scope/boolean/reason disagreement.
No producer golden vectors cover eligible, insufficient/partial/stale/revoked/QA/transform/consumption/global-shortcut/LLM-provider cases.
No pinned Main implementation independently recomputes the same decision, discards producer authority, derives a compatibility alias or proves disagreement fails closed.

implementation_packet.path_state: All five paths remain absent, untracked and clean; they are disjoint from frozen v1, dirty 08.05 and prepared 09.01/09.02/09.04 paths.
implementation_packet.consumer_dependency: Main must independently implement and prove the pinned decision/disagreement contract before completion.
implementation_packet.next_action: Hold until MF-P6-09.04 is implemented/adopted and exact-project worker routing is qualified; do not dispatch or duplicate while worker lanes remain disabled.

claim_boundary: This audit credits the frozen observation shape, rank guard and completed authority lattice only. It does not implement producer or Main recomputation, prove disagreement behavior, satisfy MF-P6-09.04, or complete MF-P6-09.05.
